title: Cozy Sweet Sausage
description: A vegan-friendly Moroccan dish featuring fermented and flaky sausage made with dark soft brown sugar and cooked sous-vide for a cozy treat.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix sesame seeds, flax seeds, and dark soft brown sugar. Add water and vinegar to create a paste.
Stir in saffron threads until well combined.
Fold in olive oil and dill weed for added flavor. Mix thoroughly.
Heat the mixture over medium heat until thickened slightly.
Remove from heat and cool before using as a spread or topping on various dishes.
Optional: For sous-vide, place mixture in a vacuum-sealed bag with 1% of its volume in olive oil. Set temperature to 160°F (71°C) for about 4 hours.
